charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1101_0100:
Lyra invited [Name:PlayerNickname ] to
visit a certain Trainer together.
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_0300:
Whoa! Um... Wh-what do you need
from me?
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_0400:
We stopped by because we heard you and
Entei are super strong at battling!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_0700:
I don’t believe there’s anything I could teach
a Neo Champion...
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_0800: Oh, but...um... May I ask you something?
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1000:
You say you want advice... Is that because
you want to grow stronger?
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1200:
I’ve a bunch of reasons. One is that as a
Neo Champion, I want to set an example
for everybody.
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1300:
But most of all, I want to understand Entei
better!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1500:
May I ask something else? Lyra, what do you
think of Entei?
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1600:
Ummm... Entei are so energetic that
whenever they roar, a volcano erupts
somewhere. Or so they say!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1700:
Entei may look calm and composed, but it
has extreme power that can’t be restrained!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_1800:
I’m worried I won’t do a good job drawing
out Entei’s Fire-type moves and strength.
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_0302_2100: You’ve got the energy to match it!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_0402_2200:
I may not be in a position to say this...
but have more confidence in yourself.
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_2300:
Thanks—both of you. I feel more
confident now!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_2400:
We can’t lose to Ethan’s Raikou or Kris’s
Suicune. Right?!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_2700:
As long as we’re in a battle, that is...
I’m not so good at s-speaking...
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_2800:
If we battle together as a tag team, I think
I could give some advice...
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_2900:
Pairing up our Entei for a tag battle
sounds fun!
charaepi_ch0002_90_kotone/2301_1201_3000: Let’s head out and find us some opponents!
